title: RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: TRANSITION PROJECTS RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in accessing services and agencies to help people transition out of homelessness into stable housing. The center offers showers, laundry, haircuts, clothing, lockers, and mailing address service. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 18 and older experiencing homelessness Hours: Resource Center: Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays: 8:30am-3pm. All service intakes end 15 minutes before close. 1st Thursday and 3rd Tuesday of the month the Resource Center closes at noon. Restroom and showers: Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays: 8:30am-3pm Clothing: Monday/Friday 10am-11am, Wednesday 1pm-2pm Haircuts: Wednesday-Friday, times vary Mailroom: Monday-Friday 8:30am-10am and 12:45pm-3:30pm, Saturday 1pm-3pm (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 280-4700 TDD 711 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Two blocks northwest of Union Station. On theTriMet MAX Yellow and Green lines. Services: General Clothing Provision * Homelessness Issues Hair and Nail Care * Homelessness Issues Homeless Drop In Centers Household Goods Storage * Homelessness Issues Laundry Facilities * Homelessness Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homelessness Issues Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - IDENTIFICATION ASSISTANCE GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - MEDICAL CLINIC HOUSING/SHELTER - ARGYLE GARDENS HOUSING/SHELTER - BARBARA MAHER APARTMENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - CLARK CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - DOREEN'S PLACE HOUSING/SHELTER - JEAN'S PLACE TRANSPORTATION - TRIMET TICKETS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
